summary: Iteration 46 - EchoStratus Universal Decision Engine Test PASSED. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend EchoStratus panel fully functional with all 12 views working: Executive, Ask, Budget, Forecast, What-If, Projects, CapEx, Events, Signals, Actions, Portfolio, Risk. New Ask View (AI Decision Engine) and Projects View (5-Year Pro Forma) working correctly with real data.

minor.issue: Question classification for 'expand seating' classifies as 'new_venue' instead of 'capex' due to keyword 'expand' matching new_venue pattern first

critical_code_review_comments: EchoStratus frontend (~1550 lines) is well-structured with clear component separation for all 12 views
Ask View: Question input, 5 template categories (New Venue, Events & Activations, Capital Investment, Operations, Strategic), AI analysis with financial model, Run Feasibility button
Projects View: Project configuration form with sliders, 5-year pro forma table, investment summary (NPV, breakeven, recommendation), sensitivity analysis grid, staffing model
All views have proper data-testid attributes for testing
API calls use window.location.origin for proper URL handling
IBM Plex fonts and Bloomberg Terminal dark aesthetic implemented correctly
Real data from MongoDB displayed with proper formatting (currency, percentages)
AI analysis uses Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4.1-mini) with deterministic fallback

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 12 views working, all navigation tabs clickable)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tests use existing MongoDB data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 verified the new Universal Decision Engine features in EchoStratus. All 12 navigation tabs work: Executive, Ask, Budget, Forecast, What-If (Scenarios), Projects, CapEx, Events (Activations), Signals, Actions (Recommendations), Portfolio, Risk. New API endpoints tested: GET /api/echo-stratus/decision/templates (5 categories of question templates), POST /api/echo-stratus/decision/ask (AI-powered question answering with classification and financial model), POST /api/echo-stratus/project/analyze (5-year pro forma with NPV, breakeven, sensitivity), POST /api/echo-stratus/event/feasibility (GO/NOT WORTH IT verdict with risk factors). Frontend panel accessible via sidebar 'EchoStratus' button (at y~888 in sidebar).

backend_api_tests.decision_templates: PASS - returns 5 categories (New Venue, Events & Activations, Capital Investment, Operations, Strategic) with 4 questions each
backend_api_tests.decision_ask_guest_chef: PASS - classifies as guest_chef_event, returns financial model with revenue, cost, profit, margin, recommendation
backend_api_tests.decision_ask_new_venue: PASS - classifies as new_venue, returns investment, breakeven, revenue projections
backend_api_tests.decision_ask_wine_event: PASS - classifies as wine_event, returns event_activation model with annual projections
backend_api_tests.decision_ask_capex: PASS - classifies correctly for equipment questions
backend_api_tests.decision_ask_pricing: PASS - classifies as pricing, returns incremental revenue calculation
backend_api_tests.decision_ask_staffing: PASS - classifies as staffing, returns annual cost and revenue needed to justify
backend_api_tests.project_analyze_new_restaurant: PASS - returns 5-year pro forma with investment breakdown, revenue model, staffing, NPV, sensitivity (7 scenarios), recommendation
backend_api_tests.project_analyze_different_params: PASS - handles different project types and parameters
backend_api_tests.event_feasibility_go: PASS - returns GO verdict with revenue, costs, profitability, breakeven covers, risk factors
backend_api_tests.event_feasibility_not_worth_it: PASS - returns NOT WORTH IT verdict for high-cost/low-revenue events
backend_api_tests.event_feasibility_series: PASS - calculates annual impact for event series (12x single event)

frontend_ui_tests.panel_loads: PASS - EchoStratus panel opens from sidebar
frontend_ui_tests.navigation_12_tabs: PASS - All 12 tabs visible and clickable (Executive, Ask, Budget, Forecast, What-If, Projects, CapEx, Events, Signals, Actions, Portfolio, Risk)
frontend_ui_tests.ask_view: PASS - Question input, Analyze button, 5 template categories, Run Feasibility button all visible
frontend_ui_tests.ask_templates: PASS - 5 categories with questions: New Venue (4), Events & Activations (4), Capital Investment (4), Operations (4), Strategic (4)
frontend_ui_tests.ask_analysis: PASS - Clicking template question runs AI analysis, shows result with GUEST CHEF EVENT badge, AI ANALYSIS text, FINANCIAL MODEL grid, COST BREAKDOWN, BASELINE CONTEXT
frontend_ui_tests.ask_feasibility_button: PASS - 'Run Full Event Feasibility: Guest Chef Dinner ($5K fee, 60 covers, $185 ticket + $65 wine)' button visible
frontend_ui_tests.projects_view: PASS - Project configuration form with inputs and sliders visible
frontend_ui_tests.projects_inputs: PASS - Project Name, Type, Seats, Avg Check inputs; Build Cost, FF&E, Food Cost%, Labor%, Turns/Day, Year1 Ramp% sliders
frontend_ui_tests.projects_run_button: PASS - 'Run 5-Year Pro Forma' button visible and clickable
frontend_ui_tests.projects_result: PASS - Investment summary (Total Investment $975K, Annual Revenue $4.8M, Breakeven 6.7mo, NPV $4.6M, 5-Year EBITDA $7.5M, Decision: Invest)
frontend_ui_tests.projects_proforma_table: PASS - 5-year table with Occupancy, Revenue, Food Cost, Labor, Total Cost, EBITDA, EBITDA%, Cumulative CF per year
frontend_ui_tests.risk_view: PASS - Risk Exposure Radar with 6 dimensions (Supplier Dependency HIGH, Labor LOW, Menu Volatility LOW, Pipeline MEDIUM, Pricing LOW, Weather/Seasonal LOW), Overall: LOW (32)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs return real data from MongoDB. AI narrative uses Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4.1-mini) with deterministic fallback.
